title: Farmland Water [Light QoL for Farm/ Walking on water]
description: Allows players to walk on water adjacent to farmland; toggle with /gamerule FarmlandWater.
body:
# 🌱💧 Farmland Water – Walk Your Fields Without Getting Wet

Irrigation trenches no longer slow you down. Farmland Water automatically replaces water blocks beside tilled soil with an invisible, waterlogged platform so crops stay hydrated while you walk across them.
## ✨ Features

- Invisible walking surface – special block collides only from above while remaining waterlogged

- Auto placement & cleanup – water next to farmland converts to platforms; unused ones revert to water if the farmland disappears or the gamerule is disabled

- Real-time water detection – bucket pours or flowing water convert instantly

- Gamerule toggle – enables or disables the feature
```
/gamerule FarmlandWater <true|false>
```
- Always in sync – periodic scans keep platforms aligned with your fields

💡 Ideal for neat farm layouts, efficient harvesting routes, and mobility-focused builds.

🤝 Want automated harvesting and replanting? Pair with [AutoSow – Auto Harvest & Replant](https://modrinth.com/mod/autosow-by-neni-o) for a seamless farming experience and [Stack Manager](https://modrinth.com/mod/stack-manager) for per-item stack caps (up to 99) on seeds, crops, and potions, keeping your barns and backpacks tidy.[Farmer Enchants](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmer-enchants) for hoe enchants and better experience while farming.
